# 01_claims — example-project

tags: #example

---

## [C-01] GR66 mediates detection of bitter compounds

Content: In taste sensilla of Papilio xuthus larvae, GR66 responds to bitter compounds (furanocoumarins).
Status: confirmed
Related Evidence: E-01, E-02

## [C-02] GR66 KO larvae show reduced avoidance of rue

Content: GR66 knockout larvae generated by CRISPR show significantly increased feeding time on rue compared to wild-type.
Status: confirmed
Related Evidence: E-03

## [C-03] GR66 expression is restricted to taste sensilla in larvae

Content: RNA-seq and in situ hybridization confirm that GR66 expression is localized to taste sensilla in the mouthparts.
Status: under consideration
Related Evidence: E-04

## [C-04] GR66 is not the sole determinant of host selection

Content: Some avoidance behavior persists in GR66 KO larvae, suggesting cooperation with other receptors.
Status: evidence needed
Related Evidence:
